title: cupressus × symbolica
intro: Cupressus × symbolica, also known as Lawson Cypress, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Cupressus arizonica and Cupressus macrocarpa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of essential oils containing cedrol, bornyl acetate, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lawson Cypress include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in relieving respiratory issues and skin conditions. Lawson Cypress is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, to promote relaxation and alleviate stress.
